properties.displayName: UAV S6 - Operator Brute Force / Unauthorized Access
properties.description: UAV 운영자 인증 공격 탐지. [A] 단일 IP 1분 내 로그인 실패 5회 이상(brute force) [B] 로그인 성공 직전 실패 3회 이상(credential stuffing) [C] 알 수 없는 세션 토큰 사용. UAVOpAudit_CL 기반. MITRE ATT&CK: T1110·T1078
properties.query:
let approvedOps = _GetWatchlist('Approved_Operators_List') | project Operator;
let lookback = 1h;
// [블록 A] Brute Force - 1분 내 동일 IP 5회 이상 실패
let BruteForce =
    UAVOpAudit_CL
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
    | where EventType == "login_failure"
    | summarize FailCount = count(), Operators = make_set(Operator)
        by ClientIp, bin(TimeGenerated, 1m)
    | where FailCount >= 5
    | extend TriggerReason = "BruteForce_Login_Failure"
    | extend DetectionDetail = strcat(
        "ClientIp:", ClientIp,
        "|FailCount:", FailCount,
        "|Operators:", tostring(Operators)
    )
    | extend UAVId = "SOC-AUTH"
    | project TimeGenerated, UAVId, TriggerReason, DetectionDetail, ClientIp;
// [블록 B] Credential Stuffing - 실패 3회 후 성공
let CredStuffing =
    UAVOpAudit_CL
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
    | where EventType in ("login_failure", "login_success")
    | summarize
        FailCount = countif(EventType == "login_failure"),
        SuccessCount = countif(EventType == "login_success")
        by Operator, ClientIp, bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
    | where FailCount >= 3 and SuccessCount >= 1
    | extend TriggerReason = "CredentialStuffing_FailThenSuccess"
    | extend DetectionDetail = strcat(
        "Operator:", Operator,
        "|ClientIp:", ClientIp,
        "|Failures:", FailCount
    )
    | extend UAVId = "SOC-AUTH"
    | project TimeGenerated, UAVId, TriggerReason, DetectionDetail, ClientIp;
// [블록 C] 알 수 없는 세션 토큰
let UnknownSession =
    UAVOpAudit_CL
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
    | where EventType == "logout_unknown"
    | extend TriggerReason = "Unknown_Session_Token"
    | extend DetectionDetail = strcat(
        "Operator:", Operator,
        "|ClientIp:", ClientIp,
        "|FailReason:", FailReason
    )
    | extend UAVId = "SOC-AUTH"
    | project TimeGenerated, UAVId, TriggerReason, DetectionDetail, ClientIp;
BruteForce
| union CredStuffing
// [블록 D] 미인가 Operator 탐지
let UnauthorizedOperator =
    UAVOpAudit_CL
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
    | where EventType == "login_success"
    | where Operator !in (approvedOps)
    | extend TriggerReason = "Unauthorized_Operator_Login"
    | extend DetectionDetail = strcat("Operator:", Operator, "|ClientIp:", ClientIp)
    | extend UAVId = "SOC-AUTH"
    | project TimeGenerated, UAVId, TriggerReason, DetectionDetail, ClientIp;
| union UnknownSession
| union UnauthorizedOperator
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
